privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for openvsp_airfoil_resection. Verified that the task operates on the real NASA eCRM-001 conceptual aircraft model (eCRM-001_wing_tail.vsp3). Confirmed that the mathematical parameters for the root NACA 4415 airfoil (camber=0.04, camber_loc=0.4, tc=0.15) and tip NACA 2410 airfoil (camber=0.02, camber_loc=0.4, tc=0.10) match perfectly with standard NACA 4-digit definitions, the explicit task instructions, and the evaluation logic in verifier.py. However, a critical defect was discovered in the verifier: it attempts to parse the .vsp3 XML using `geom.find("Type")` to locate a `<Type>WingGeom</Type>` element. Because the OpenVSP v3 file format represents geometry types as distinct XML tags (e.g., `<WingGeom>`) rather than child `<Type>` elements, this search perpetually evaluates to None. Consequently, the verifier unconditionally fails to identify any wings in the model, capping the maximum achievable score at 10/100 and rendering the task programmatically unscorable.
